query:
select products.id, products.store_id, prices.amount as price_amount
      from products
      join prices on prices.product_id = products.id
      where 
        products.id = any($1) and
        exists (
          select 1
          from store_members
          where 
            store_members.store_id = products.store_id and 
            store_members.user_id = $2
        )
